segments.speaker: 题目4/5
segments.text: Listen to a conversation. I've done a bit of watercolor painting on my own, and I have a starter kit, but I'm thinking about taking a class. I feel like I need better supplies and some guidance to really improve. Well, my aunt just joined a beginning photography class at the community center, but it's not going so smoothly. Why is that? She's not a total beginner, so it feels a bit slow for her. She already knows some of what they're teaching, but the more advanced class moves too fast I see. I'll probably talk to an instructor 1​st to see where I'd fit.
